payload.title: Infrastructure flexibility
payload.fact: SambaStack switches between multiple frontier-scale models, enabling complex agentic AI workflows to execute end-to-end on one node.
supporting_evidence: SambaStack switches between multiple frontier-scale models
Enabling complex agentic AI workflows to execute end-to-end on one node

payload.title: Energy efficiency
payload.fact: SambaNova Systems generates the maximum number of tokens per watt with the highest power efficiency, enabling fast inference and scalability.
supporting_evidence: Generating the maximum number of tokens per watt with the highest power efficiency

payload.title: Inference at scale
payload.fact: SambaNova Systems uses groundbreaking dataflow technology and memory architecture to deliver the performance and speed required for ever-growing AI models.
supporting_evidence: Groundbreaking dataflow technology and memory architecture
Delivers the performance and speed required for ever-growing AI models
